name: Skillet Dinner
recipeIngredient: 1 7 oz can of diced green chilies
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a skillet with Pam and heat over medium-high heat.
2. Add the Vege-Burger, chopped onions, and bell pepper to the skillet. Cook until the onions become translucent.
3. Stir in the tomato wedges, green chilies, garlic powder, and basil. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. While the sauce is simmering, bring a pot of water to boil. Add the macaroni and cook according to package instructions until tender.
5. Drain the cooked macaroni and mix it with the sauce in the skillet. Stir until combined.
6. Serve hot or reheat before serving. The dish tastes even better the next day.
Serves 8
Approximate preparation time: 45-60 minutes
